our team will create your reunion banner artwork **Step 1:** Choose your reunion banner size **Step 2:** Upload your design file or artwork **Step 3:** Add special instructions for our design team PASTE INTO: Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Vinyl Reunion Banners for School Events & Celebrations

Due to the latest shipping regulations, all vinyl banners that exceed 8 feet in both directions will be folded for shipping. If you do not want your banners folded, please contact us to get a custom freight quote.

Make the most of your school reunion with an eye-catching custom vinyl banner. From all-school reunions and class celebrations to homecoming events and anniversary gatherings, we help you create memorable displays that welcome alumni and celebrate your school's legacy with professionally designed custom vinyl reunion banners.

Here at Banners.com, our goal is to deliver a reunion banner that you're proud to display. That's why we take great care in our craft and work closely with you to bring your vision to reality. One of the ways we do this is through strict quality checks. Our team includes seasoned graphic designers and production experts who have been with us for many years.

They're deeply familiar with the nuances of vinyl banner printing for school events and are dedicated to collaborating to ensure you receive a tailor-made reunion banner. If something doesn't meet our standards, our staff of in-house graphic designers will contact you to fix it immediately. Your satisfaction is our number one priority.

We offer a wide selection of custom vinyl reunion banners and signage options, including sizes ranging from 1'x1' to 8'x50', unlimited design options in our online designer, and you can even choose production time to ensure your reunion banner is delivered when you need it for your event.

Professional Quality Reunion Banners Made in the USA

Your reunion banner is made with the finest vinyl materials available and printed using state-of-the-art, large-format printers for vibrant colors that showcase your school colors and celebrate your class year. All banners are manufactured and printed in the USA.

Exact sizes of banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature-sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Please note our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Vinyl Banner Materials for Reunion Display & Installation

Premium 13oz Vinyl Banner Material

Our standard reunion banners are printed on durable 13oz vinyl material, perfect for both indoor and outdoor school events. This heavyweight vinyl provides excellent durability for gymnasium installations, outdoor pavilion displays, and entrance way mounting.

Mesh Vinyl for Windy Outdoor Locations

For outdoor reunion events in windy conditions, our mesh vinyl material allows air flow while maintaining vibrant print quality. Ideal for fence mounting and outdoor event displays where wind resistance is important.

Fabric Banner Material

For indoor reunion celebrations requiring a premium appearance, our fabric banner material provides a sophisticated finish perfect for formal dining venues and indoor ceremony spaces.

Material Durability for School Events

All vinyl banner materials are UV-resistant and weather-resistant, ensuring your reunion banner maintains its appearance throughout your multi-day event schedule. Materials are designed to withstand normal indoor and outdoor display conditions.

Custom sizing and specialty material applications are available upon request for unique reunion venue requirements.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Vinyl Banner Finishing Options for Event Setup

Grommets for Easy Installation

Standard nickel grommets are placed every 2-3 feet around the perimeter of your reunion banner, making installation quick and secure. Grommets allow for rope, bungee cord, or zip tie mounting at your reunion venue.

Pole Pockets for Professional Display

Pole pocket finishing creates a clean, professional appearance for your reunion banner. Available as top pole pocket, side pole pocket, or top and bottom pole pockets depending on your display requirements.

Hemmed Edges for Durability

All reunion banners include hemmed edges to prevent fraying and extend the life of your banner. Double-fold hems provide additional strength for repeated use and storage.

Wind Slits for Outdoor Events

For outdoor reunion celebrations, wind slits can be added to reduce wind stress on your banner and mounting hardware. This finishing option helps prevent damage during outdoor display.

Custom Finishing Options

Specialty finishing options are available for unique reunion venue requirements, including custom mounting solutions and reinforcement options for large format displays.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Vinyl Banner Production & Turnaround Times

Standard Production Timeline

Most custom reunion banners are produced within 3-5 business days from artwork approval. This timeline includes design review, printing, finishing, and preparation for shipping to meet your reunion event schedule.

Rush Production Available

For last-minute reunion planning needs, rush production options are available. Contact our customer service team to discuss expedited production timelines that can accommodate your event date requirements.

Design Review Process

All custom reunion banner artwork goes through our quality review process before production begins. Our design team will contact you if any adjustments are needed to ensure optimal print quality for your school colors and text elements.

Production Scheduling for Large Orders

Multiple banner orders or large quantity reunion banner orders may require additional production time. We recommend placing orders 2-3 weeks in advance for multi-banner reunion displays.

Artwork Approval Timeline

Digital proofs are typically provided within 24-48 hours of order placement. Production begins immediately upon your approval of the final artwork proof, ensuring your reunion banner meets your exact specifications.

PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Vinyl Banner Payment & Ordering Options

Secure Online Ordering

Place your reunion banner order securely through our online ordering system. We accept all major credit cards, PayPal, and electronic payment methods for convenient checkout processing.

Purchase Order Processing

School organizations and reunion committees can submit purchase orders for processing. Net payment terms are available for qualifying educational and organizational accounts upon credit approval.

Custom Quote Services

For large quantity reunion banner orders or complex multi-banner displays, request a custom quote for volume pricing and specialized production options.

Split Payment Options

Large reunion banner orders can be processed with deposit payment options, allowing you to secure production scheduling while finalizing your complete order details.

Tax-Exempt Processing

Educational institutions and qualifying nonprofit organizations can process tax-exempt orders by providing appropriate documentation during the checkout process.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Options for Custom Reunion Banner Delivery

Standard Ground Shipping

Most reunion banners ship via standard ground service within 1-2 business days of production completion. Ground shipping typically delivers within 3-7 business days depending on your location relative to our production facility.

Expedited Shipping Available

For time-sensitive reunion events, expedited shipping options include 2-day and overnight delivery services. Expedited shipping can be selected during checkout or added to existing orders before production completion.

Large Banner Shipping Requirements

Reunion banners exceeding 8 feet in both directions will be folded for standard shipping. If you prefer your banner shipped without folding, freight delivery options are available through our custom quote service.

Multiple Banner Shipments

Orders containing multiple reunion banners are carefully packaged to prevent damage during transit. Large orders may be split into multiple shipments to ensure proper handling and delivery.

Delivery Address Considerations

Reunion banners can be shipped directly to your event venue, school facility, or personal address. Ensure someone will be available to receive the delivery, especially for signature-required shipments.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

School Reunion & Event Uses for Custom Vinyl Banners

All-School Reunion Celebrations

Create welcoming entrance displays for all-school reunions spanning multiple graduating classes. Custom vinyl banners can feature school logos, establishment dates, and celebratory messaging to welcome returning alumni.

Class-Specific Reunion Banners

Individual graduating class reunions benefit from personalized banners featuring graduation year, class motto, and school colors. Perfect for registration areas, dining venues, and photo backdrops.

Homecoming Event Displays

Enhance homecoming celebrations with custom banners for parade entries, gymnasium decorations, and outdoor festival areas. Vinyl banners withstand outdoor conditions while maintaining vibrant school spirit displays.

School Anniversary Celebrations

Commemorate significant school milestones with custom anniversary banners featuring historical elements, timeline information, and celebratory designs that honor your institution's legacy.

Memorial and Tribute Displays

Honor deceased classmates, beloved teachers, and school figures with respectful memorial banners that can be displayed throughout reunion events as lasting tributes.

Registration and Directional Signage

Guide reunion attendees with custom directional banners for registration areas, parking instructions, venue locations, and activity scheduling throughout your multi-location reunion events.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Reunion Banner Artwork Requirements for Professional Printing

File Format Specifications

Submit artwork files in high-resolution PDF, AI, EPS, or PNG formats for optimal print quality. Vector-based files (AI, EPS) provide the best results for text elements and logo reproduction on reunion banners.

Resolution Requirements

Image files should be provided at 150 DPI minimum at actual banner size for sharp, professional printing. Higher resolution files ensure crisp reproduction of school logos, photographs, and detailed design elements.

Color Profile Guidelines

For accurate school color reproduction, provide artwork in CMYK color mode. If you're working with specific school colors, include Pantone color references to ensure precise color matching on your reunion banner.

Text and Font Considerations

Use fonts that are easily readable from a distance, especially for outdoor reunion displays. Sans-serif fonts typically provide better readability on vinyl banners. Ensure all fonts are outlined or embedded in your artwork files.

Design Layout Guidelines

Include a 2-inch bleed area around your design to accommodate finishing processes. Keep important text and design elements at least 3 inches from banner edges to ensure they're not affected by grommets or hemming.

Professional Design Services

If you need assistance creating your reunion banner artwork, our in-house design team can work with your concept, photos, and text to create professional layouts that effectively represent your school and reunion celebration.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom Vinyl Reunion Banners for Your School Event

Did we answer all your questions? If not, please give us a call at (320) 391-5300, and one of our customer service representatives will be more than happy to help you plan your reunion banner project.

Looking for something more specific? We can provide custom quotes for special projects, unique sizes, and larger quantity orders perfect for multi-class reunions and school-wide celebrations.

Why Choose Banners.com for Your Reunion Banners

Six Customizable Banner Materials: Your reunion banner is made with the finest materials available and printed using state-of-the-art, large-format printers for vibrant colors that showcase your school pride. All banners are manufactured and printed in the USA.

Experienced Design Team: Our seasoned graphic designers understand school branding and reunion event requirements, ensuring your banner creates the perfect welcome for returning alumni.

Quality Guarantee: Every reunion banner undergoes strict quality checks before shipping. If something doesn't meet our standards, we'll make it right immediately.

Fast Turnaround: With production times as fast as 3-5 business days and expedited options available, we can meet your reunion timeline requirements.

Get started on your custom reunion banner today and create a memorable display that celebrates your school's legacy and welcomes alumni home.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions About Custom Reunion Banners

What sizes are available for reunion banners?

We offer custom vinyl reunion banners in sizes ranging from 1'x1' up to 8'x50'. Popular reunion banner sizes include 3'x6', 4'x8', and 6'x10' for entrance displays and registration areas. Custom sizes are available to fit your specific venue requirements.

Can you match our school colors exactly?

Yes, we can match your school colors precisely. Provide Pantone color references or official school brand guidelines with your artwork, and our printing process will reproduce your colors accurately on the vinyl banner material.

How long do vinyl reunion banners last?

Our vinyl reunion banners are designed to last for multiple events with proper storage. When used outdoors, they typically maintain their appearance for 1-3 years depending on weather exposure. Indoor banners can last much longer with minimal fading.

Can I reuse my reunion banner for future events?

Absolutely! Vinyl banners are durable and can be rolled up for storage between reunion events. Avoid folding when possible to prevent creasing, and store in a cool, dry location for best longevity.

What if I need my reunion banner quickly?

We offer rush production and expedited shipping options for time-sensitive reunion events. Contact our customer service team to discuss timeline options that can accommodate your event date.

Do you offer installation services?

While we don't provide installation services, all reunion banners come with grommets or finishing options that make installation straightforward. We can provide guidance on mounting options for your specific venue.

Can you help design my reunion banner?

Yes! Our in-house design team can create custom reunion banner layouts using your school logos, photos, and text. Simply provide your concept and materials, and we'll create professional artwork for your approval.

What happens if my banner is damaged during shipping?

All reunion banners are carefully packaged for shipping protection. If your banner arrives damaged, contact us immediately and we'll arrange for a replacement to be produced and shipped right away.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
